# Motive Cortex

> UK technology consultancy delivering consulting, technical due diligence, CTO-as-a-Service, and embedded systems design.

Motive Cortex Limited partners with startups and scale-ups to ship pragmatic technology strategy and engineering leadership. Contact: hello@motivecortex.com.
